(a)

NAT
Correct answer: 48
Solution

Q13 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A centrifugal pump has a discharge rate of 2000 of water per min against a total head of 200 m.
If the pump efficiency is 75%, the input power to the pump in kW is ______. (Upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 87.2
Solution

87.2 (87 - 87.4)

(i) Head at the base of the nozzle = 32 m
(ii) Discharge of the nozzle = 0.18 m3/s
(iii) Area of the jet = 7500 mm2
(iv) Mechanical efficiency = 94%
The power lost (in kW) in the nozzle will be ______. (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 4.67
Solution

4.67 (4.6 - 4.7)

Q17 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Brine of specific gravity 1.15 is draining from the bottom of a large open tank through a 80 mm pipe. The drain pipe ends at a point 10 m below the surface of the brine in the tank. The velocity of flow along the stream line at the point of discharge from the pipe is ______. (Round off to nearest integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 14
Solution

14 (14 - 14)

Correct answer: 251.12
Solution

251.12 (249 - 253)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.033
Solution

0.033 (0.031 - 0.036)

Solution

Q31 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A torpedo-shaped object of 900 mm diameter is to move in air at 60 m/s and its drag is to be estimated from tests in water on a half-scale model. Viscosity of air and water is 1.86 × 10–5 Pas and 1.01 × 10–3 Pas respectively. The density of air and water is 1.20 kg/m3 and 1000 kg/m3. If the drag on the model is 540 N, the drag on the full scale object is_____ [Round off to two decimal places]

NAT
Correct answer: 152.60
Solution

152.60 (148.50 - 154.50)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

(Correct to two decimal places)

 
NAT
Correct answer: 1.08
Solution

1.08 (1.01 - 1.20)
